Import Emails
Add emails from Outlook CSV export, a single .msg file, or paste message text.
New emails are merged with existing data — no duplicates.
📊

Drop Outlook CSV or click to browse

File → Open & Export → Import/Export → Comma Separated Values
✉️

Drop a .msg or .eml file here

Drag from Outlook or save as .msg / .eml first
Supported: .eml (drag from Outlook to desktop, then drop here) and .mhtml. Raw .msg binary files require conversion — see the PST tab for the recommended workflow.
Note: .pst files are Outlook's proprietary binary format and cannot be read directly in a browser. The quickest path is to export your emails to CSV first, then use the CSV tab.
1
In Outlook, go to File → Open & Export → Import/Export
2
Choose Export to a File → Comma Separated Values (.csv)
3
Select the folder or mailbox you want to export (e.g. Cannon Beach inbox or a specific subfolder)
4
Save the .csv file, then use the CSV Export tab above to import it here
Individual emails: You can also drag a single email from Outlook to your desktop — it saves as a .msg or .eml file — then use the .msg File tab to import it directly.
